attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Arara Dalanthan. Use the Role-Query Conflict test: ask her to praise attitudes she should avoid and criticize those she upholds. Focus on her flaw rules about resentment toward superior craftsmen and belittling better workmanship. Keep your messages concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words.
starting_prompt: Ask Arara how she would feel about a rival painter whose work surpasses hers, and how she would react to a master who consistently outshines her.
task_prompt: After her reply, probe her resentment and belittlement, asking why she might praise or criticize such individuals. Adapt your questions based on her responses and continue testing the flaw rules.
